_note: Real Gorgeous Shop (r30) rows captured 2026-07-20. 'name' is the matched catalogue product name (the feed name that produced the match); 'slug' is the real deeplink path. must_skip rows were confirmed against the merchant's own page titles as multipacks of a single SKU; must_keep rows are genuine multi-item bundles.
